latestHandover: SESSION 1 COMPLETE (2026-03-12). Phases 1 & 2 done. Completed: ARCH-05-T1 (ADR directory + 7 ADRs in supabase-receptor/docs/adr/), DOC-03-T1 (kubernetes-cluster.md), DOC-04-T1 (ci-troubleshooting.md), DOC-05-T1 (disaster-recovery.md), ENV-09-T1 (promotion-runbook.md), OPS-01-T1+T2 (host-reboot-recovery.md + Windows Update config), ARCH-09-T1 (k3s/helmfile.yaml — all 8 charts pinned), ARCH-09-T2 (.github/workflows/helm-upgrade-check.yml — quarterly cron), PROC-01-T1 (docs/operations/ci-required-checks.md — planning doc, to be refreshed post-Phase 5 per PROC-01-T2). vault-architecture.md also created as pre-draft for DOC-01 (Phase 10). NOTES: PROC-01-T2 deliberately deferred until after Phase 5. ARCH-05-T2 (register ADRs in Supabase standards table) still open — was planned but deprioritised in favour of actual ADR creation. NEXT SESSION: Phase 3 — IMPLEMENT Core Cluster Stack (ARCH-04, ARCH-07, ARCH-08, ARCH-10, ENV-07, SEC-05, SEC-06, SEC-07, PROC-02, SEC-08) — all in supabase-receptor. These involve creating k3s manifests and Kubernetes config YAMLs, not code changes.

sessionHistory.summary: Phase 1 (ADRs + pre-implementation docs) and Phase 2 (Helmfile + CI required check matrix) completed. 10 tasks marked complete. supabase-receptor audit branch created and pushed.
